case_title: IRENE M LIEBERMAN VS. ELAINA MALDONADO et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIEBERMAN, IRENE M DBA THE MONROE AS TO DEFENDANT MALDONADO, ELAINA AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
